signal.title: M19 capability documentation generator
signal.description: Add a repo-local tusq docs command that generates Markdown capability documentation and review artifacts from tusq.manifest.json, covering capability names, descriptions, approval state, side_effect_class, sensitivity_class, auth_hints, provenance, examples, constraints, redaction, and manifest version metadata.

evidence.summary: VISION.md calls for documentation and adoption surfaces: generated capability docs, examples, permission docs, and review artifacts. Current CLI has review output but no generated docs artifact.
